name: Gitea Act Runner
description: Gitea Act Runner is the official self-hosted runner for Gitea Actions. It registers with your Gitea instance and executes CI/CD workflow jobs, with full compatibility with GitHub Actions workflow syntax.

notes.text: During installation you will be prompted for your Gitea instance URL, registration token, runner name, and labels.
To get a registration token, go to your Gitea instance → Settings → Actions → Runners → Create Runner Token.
View runner logs with: journalctl -u act_runner -f
The runner config is stored at /opt/act_runner/config.yaml and can be edited to customise job concurrency, cache settings, and more.
